reviews.text: Truly the best in town! I’ve been to Mirela and Anastasia on numerous occasions for lots of different treatments. They are so warm, welcoming and professional. You feel really comfortable throughout the procedure. I would highly recommend Worcester Beauty Clinic in Evesham. I’m yet to get my nails done, but I know Natali would be amazing from what I’ve already seen. I shall continue to return here time and time again for all treatments or pampering sessions. Thanks ladies xxx
reviews.author: Louise Carter

reviews.text:
Very professional, hygienic and affordable service, Anastasia explained fully how the procedure works.
She made me feel very comfortable and at ease through the whole procedure.
Amazing service and really friendly.
I would definitely recommend ADBEAUTY at Worcester Beauty Clinic
to anyone else who’s looking for tattoo removal. Anastasia is amazing .👍🤗🩵
reviews.author: Konstantins Matvejevs

reviews.text:
I absolutely love my visits to Worcester Beauty Clinic, I know I will always leave feeling so good.
My skin looks fabulous after all my facials and I’ve now got brows to be proud of. I’m so grateful to my friend who recommended them as I now have so much more confidence and have no problem leaving the house with no make up on!
Thank you so much ladies! I look forward to my next visit in a couple of weeks!
reviews.author: Hannah Robinson

reviews.text:
Well, what can I say ….. only one thing ….. the girls at Worcester Beauty Clinic in Evesham are the best in Worcestershire and most likely beyond!
One particular treatment I’d like to mention is Carbon Facial with ADbeauty. After just one session (recommended to do 4!) my skin looks and feels rejuvenated and so much younger! The care and attention Anastasia gave me is fantastic! I felt at ease and totally pampered!
Definitely recommend to pay a visit to the salon to anyone who needs “a pick me up” session!
reviews.author: Kristina Bancroft

reviews.text:
Absolutely in love with my new powder brows by Anastasia at Worcester Beauty clinic. The cleanliness , the professionalism of Anastasia and the other ladies is incredible , never felt more at ease.
I have also had fine line tattoos completed as well as Nails at the beauty hub and I could not be happier , thank you so much 😊
I would 100% recommend getting in touch...
reviews.author: Viki Crawford

reviews.text:
First of all, the salon is welcoming, very clean, the staff friendly considering that we were seeing each other for the first time. I am very satisfied with Anastasia’s services. She listened to my ideas and together we determined the shape and colour of the eyebrows, she worked with increased attention, very, very attentive to details. She gave me a trial of the final result, which gave me confidence and from that moment all stress and emotions accumulated flew away and I knew I was on good hands. On a scale of 1 to 10 pain felt around 4, anesthetic cream was used te easy the pain. I’m very satisfied with the final result, I even regret that I didn’t do this intervention much earlier.
I recommend with all confidence.
Thank you again Anastasia 🥰🥰🤗🤗🤗🤗🤗🤗🤗
reviews.author: Alina Moga

reviews.text: I have had a number of treatments from these gorgeous ladies I’ve had many gorgeous facials, skin boosters, Botox and fillers with Mirela. Treatments with Anastasia, It is a beautiful salon with lots of character and charm and the feeling you get when you walk in is so welcoming. The treatments from both ladies was of such a high standard and each time I walk in this salon these ladies totally looked after me and guided all the way through. Thank you guys 💫💫💫💫
reviews.author: DEBBIE “Debb” SMITH

reviews.text: Today I had my lip blush done with Anastasia, I can honestly say she was so professional throughout my appointment. She talked me through what she was doing and I felt no pain whatsoever. Anastasia listened to what I wanted and was very understanding. I absolublove my lip blush and would highly recommend
reviews.author: Anon

reviews.text: I have had a number of treatments from these gorgeous ladies. Gel nails, semi permanent make up ( Lip Blush and Powder Brows ) with Anastasia and my daughter had a gorgeous facial with Mirela. It is a beautiful salon with lots of character and charm and the feeling you get when you walk in is so welcoming. The treatments from both ladies was of such a high standard and me and my daughter were totally looked after and guided all the way through. I can’t praise these ladies enough and I would recommend WBC to anyone who want any health and beauty treatments. The best health and beauty salon in Evesham! ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️
reviews.author: Ginny Osborn

reviews.text: I have been having facials and beauty treatments with Mirela for years even before she moved to the Worcester beauty clinic. I trust her implicitly with what she advises and the treatment option’s tailored perfectly for my skin type . Mirela’s expertise, skills and knowledge is incredible , she is very talented and hardworking and therefore gives the best treatments tailored for each individual client .My skin journey with Mirela has made my skin look the best it has ever been , I have also had a carbon facial with Anastasia which also has contributed to my glowing rejuvenated skin.
reviews.author: amy brookes

reviews.text: I have been Anastasia client for more than 2 years. I just love how she takes care of my nails and my eyebrows.
reviews.author: Dana

reviews.text: Very professional beauticians, great atmosphere and always the highest level service! They will make you feel like home and will treat you like princess 😁🫶🏻
reviews.author: Ewa Bieniek

reviews.text: The best beautician I have been to, amazing service, brilliant hygiene and the place looks beautiful. Highly recommend!!
reviews.author: Vanya Petrova

reviews.text: Customer service is second to none, they are knowledgeable about all treatments and discuss your needs beforehand and they are very professional. Would definitely recommend.
reviews.author: D Lawson

reviews.text:
Amazing experience,Anastasia and the girl are the best in town for sureee
Can t wait to go there again❤️❤️

reviews.text: This is my favourite place. Professional and always feels welcome. Highly recommended 👌

reviews.text: Top class customer service. Wonderful in every way

reviews.text: Exceptionally professional service all the time!
